questionHtml:
What is the product of the reaction between pentan-2-one and sodium borohydride, NaBH4?

A. Pentan-1-ol

B. Pentan-2-ol

C. Pentanoic acid

D. Pentanal

meta.title: What is the product of the reaction between pentan-2-one and sodium borohydride, NaBH4? A. Pentan-1-ol B. Pentan-2-ol C. Pentanoic acid D. Pentanal
